mdSummary:
# Command

Command palette — keyboard-driven finder for actions.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/command

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Command | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Command | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Command | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CommandEmpty | Context | `Command.CommandContext?` | `` |  |
| CommandEmpty | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CommandEmpty | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CommandEmpty | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CommandGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CommandGroup | Heading | `string?` | `` |  |
| CommandGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CommandGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CommandInput | Context | `Command.CommandContext` | `default!` |  |
| CommandInput | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| CommandInput | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CommandInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CommandItem | Context | `Command.CommandContext?` | `` |  |
| CommandItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |

| CommandList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CommandSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CommandSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Command) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CommandEmpty) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CommandGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CommandItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CommandList) — RenderFragment slot

## Events

## Sub-components

## Cascading values it expects

## Services it injects

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Command />
```
